_gridArea.desc: Name for the area. Use in CSSGrid's gridTemplateAreas property.

_gridRowStart.desc: Specifies a grid item's start position within the grid row. Examples: auto, 3, -1, span 2

_gridRowEnd.desc: Specifies a grid item's end position within the grid row. Examples: auto, 3, -1, span 2

_gridColumnStart.desc: Specifies a grid item's start position within the grid row. Examples: auto, 3, -1, span 2

_gridColumnEnd.desc: Specifies a grid item's end position within the grid row. Examples: auto, 3, -1, span 2
